label: Transparent heather sprig motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Heather transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create a complete heather sprig isolated on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: Heather-purple blossoms, moss-green leaves, peat-brown stems, moorland softness, crisp botanical edges, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 background for removal, no shadows, gradients, texture, watermark, or text.
Constraints: no lavender confusion, no vase, no hand, no landscape.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Heather light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn board named Morphous Heather, derived from heather purple blossoms, moss green, peat brown, and moorland haze.
Required visible sections: palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, and asset examples.
Style: soft landscape system with content cards, map/data panels, calm controls, and 8px radii.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Heather dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode translation with peat-brown surfaces, heather-purple actions, moss-green states, moor-white foregrounds, and soft landscape coverage.
Required visible sections: dark mode palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, and asset examples.
